projectDescription: Learning environment for using Claude Code in marketing, copywriting, and campaign management workflows.

skills.description: Skills are loaded automatically based on context. Manual invocation with / also available.

agents.description: Agents are automatically invoked when tasks match their descriptions.

templates.description: Reusable copy templates for common formats

examples.description: Real session examples showing Claude Code workflows

sops.description: Standard operating procedures for consistent output

scripts.description: Python scripts for Smartlead API automation

notes.usage: This is a learning environment. Experiment with agents, skills, and automation.
notes.documentation: All workflows are documented in /sops/ and /examples/
notes.scripts: Python scripts in /scripts/ interact with Smartlead API
